name: dotnet
description: Comprehensive .NET development skills including C# 14 code generation, high-performance logging, configuration and options pattern, dependency injection (lifetimes, keyed services, decorators, anti-patterns), localization with .resx files, source generators, and telemetry. Use when writing C#, implementing .NET features, adding logging, configuring apps, registering services, setting up dependency injection, fixing lifetime mismatches, validating options, localizing apps, or adding telemetry, tracing, metrics, and observability.
